title: Server World Data Transmission
interaction_flow: Client → NetServer: ConnectPacket(uuid, usid, name, version, mods, color, locale)
NetServer → Administration: updatePlayerJoined(uuid, ip, name) → updates PlayerInfo
NetServer → NetServer: Player.create(); assign player properties (name, color, locale, con)
NetworkIO → NetworkIO: stream compressed to ByteArrayOutputStream (FastDeflater)
NetServer → NetConnection: sendStream(WorldStream)  [TCP stream to client]
NetServer → NetServer: player.add()  [adds player to Groups]
--- Phase 4: Periodic Entity Snapshot Sync (update loop) ---
NetServer → NetServer: [per player, per snapshotInterval] writeEntitySnapshot(player)
NetServer → Groups.sync: iterate all Syncc entities
NetServer → Client: Call.hiddenSnapshot(player.con, hiddenIds)  [if any hidden entities]

key_method_signatures.NetServer.sendWorldData: public void sendWorldData(Player player) — compresses world via NetworkIO.writeWorld, wraps in WorldStream, streams to player.con
key_method_signatures.NetServer.writeEntitySnapshot: public void writeEntitySnapshot(Player player) throws IOException — iterates Groups.sync, writes (id + classId + beforeWrite + writeSync), sends Call.entitySnapshot batches
key_method_signatures.NetServer.writeBlockSnapshots: public void writeBlockSnapshots() throws IOException — iterates BlockFlag.synced buildings, writes (pos + block.id + writeSync), sends Call.blockSnapshot
key_method_signatures.NetServer.connectConfirm: @Remote(targets=Loc.client) static void connectConfirm(Player player) — adds player, sets hasConnected, fires PlayerJoin
key_method_signatures.NetworkIO.writeWorld: public static void writeWorld(Player player, OutputStream os) — writes rules/rand/player/content/map/teamBlocks/markers/chunks via SaveIO.SaveWriter
key_method_signatures.BuildingComp.writeSync: public void writeSync(Writes write) → writeAll(write) — serialises full building state
key_method_signatures.BuildingComp.readSync: public void readSync(Reads read, byte revision) → readAll(read, revision)
key_method_signatures.TypeIO.writeUnit: public static void writeUnit(Writes write, Unit unit) — type tag byte (0=null,1=BlockUnit,2=Unit) + unit data
key_method_signatures.TypeIO.writeBuilding: public static void writeBuilding(Writes write, Building tile) — writes tile.pos() int or -1
key_method_signatures.TypeIO.writeUnitContainer: public static void writeUnitContainer(Writes write, UnitSyncContainer cont) — id + classId + beforeWrite + writeSync

key_relationships: NetServer depends_on SaveIO.SaveWriter (map + teamBlock + content chunks)
NetServer calls BuildingComp.writeSync per building in snapshot
NetServer calls Syncc.writeSync (UnitComp/BuildingComp) per entity in Groups.sync
Call.entitySnapshot / Call.blockSnapshot are @Remote UDP snapshots to clients
important_notes: World data is DEFLATE-compressed before streaming. The join pipeline is: ConnectPacket → validate (Administration) → sendWorldData (TCP stream) → client fires connectConfirm → player.add(). Ongoing sync is UDP snapshots (entity + block). TypeIO is a static utility with write*/read* helpers for primitive network types; BuildingComp.writeSync delegates to writeAll(); UnitComp has no direct writeSync override but relies on generated entity IO. maxSnapshotSize=800 bytes triggers packet flush mid-iteration.
